programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Riverside, Calif., Jarrod and Brandi have difficulty with too many choices and too much heat; Barry and Dave make an expensive wager on a couch.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Fullerton, Dusty drags a busy Lupe to the auction, where she decides to show him that "packed" isn't always "stacked;" Dave refuses to let KinderCare influence his choices, while Emily, intent on following the mystery, ends up short a wheel.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Modern-day pirates blindly bid on abandoned storage units that may contain junk or treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa hosts Kenny at her "Airbnb" and sends him to Riverside, trapping him with a mostly healthy breakfast; Ivy presses his luck and is rewarded for it; Brandi lets her sense of humor guide her, and it's no laughing matter.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Torrance gives props to Dusty & Lupe who are haunted by their locker; Kenny manages to kill several birds with one locker; Brandi gets all medieval with some strange music boxes, while Lisa re-joins the rest of the fleas to drop some new records.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: In the Mat-su, Halloween brings mayhem as Troopers respond to a roadside meltdown and recover a trove of credit cards in different names; the season's first snowfall causes chaos in Fairbanks and in Nome, Troopers bring in a wanted man as a typhoon moves in.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A man in Richland County, SC leads police on a vehicle pursuit that ends when he crashes into a highway exit sign; a female employee at a local restaurant in Tallahassee, FL allegedly stabs a customer in the back four times before being apprehended by police; neighbors in Citrus County, FL get into an argument about their dogs that ends with a chihuahua being cut with a knife.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase; an officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: Southern Law

programme.title: Southern Law
